headline: Ford Reputation Deeply Damaged by 740,000 Recall
summary: Ford (NYSE: F) ranked No. 1 among “Mainstream Brands” in the new J.D. Power Initial Quality Study. It was the first time it had occupied that spot since 2010. Much of that positive news was wiped out by a recall of more than 740,000 vehicles, according to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration. The notice ... headline: GM's Q2 US sales fall on discontinued models, EV slump; trucks and SUVs hold the line
summary: GM (GM) reported second quarter US sales of approximately 715,000 vehicles, a drop of 4.2% compared to a year ago, but said it remained the top-selling automaker in the country on the strength of its trucks, SUVs, and crossovers.

headline: WPP Announces Expansion Plans for WPP Enterprise Solutions, Its Global Business Unit for AI-Driven Transformation
